testimonials.sarah.text: NeonO transformed how we run our salon. Online booking reduced no-shows by 40% and our customers love the convenience.

testimonials.mike.text: The integrated POS system made checkout so much faster. We can focus more on our customers instead of paperwork.

testimonials.emma.text: The marketing automation helped us increase repeat bookings by 60%. It pays for itself.
faq.question1: How long does it take to set up?
faq.answer1: Most salons are up and running within 24 hours. Our team helps with data migration and staff training.
faq.question2: Do you integrate with existing systems?
faq.answer2: Yes, we integrate with popular payment processors, accounting software, and marketing tools.
faq.answer3: Yes, both you and your customers get mobile apps for booking, payments, and business management.
faq.answer4: We provide 24/7 support via chat, email, and phone. Plus free training for your entire team.

pricing.page.whatsIncludedSubtitle: Unlike other platforms, all essential features are built-in at no extra cost.
pricing.page.noCommissionDesc: Your team keeps 100% of their tips. Other platforms take up to 30%.
pricing.page.freeBookingDesc: Professional booking site included. Others charge $30-50/month extra.
pricing.page.smsMarketingDesc: Automated campaigns and reminders built-in. No add-on fees.
pricing.page.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about pricing and plans.
pricing.page.faq1a: Both Independent and Salon plans include online booking, POS, client management, SMS/email marketing, a free booking website, reports, and mobile app access. Salon plans add multi-chair scheduling, staff management, and commission tracking.
pricing.page.faq2q: How does the per-chair pricing work?
pricing.page.faq3q: Do I really get unlimited chairs after 7?
pricing.page.faq4q: Can I switch between Independent and Salon plans?
pricing.page.faq4a: Yes! You can upgrade from Independent to Salon or downgrade anytime. Changes take effect immediately and we'll prorate your billing accordingly.
pricing.page.faq5a: No setup fees, ever. We also include free data migration from your existing system and personalized onboarding.
pricing.page.faq6q: Do you take a commission on tips?
pricing.page.faq6a: Never. Unlike other platforms, we don't take any percentage of tips. Your staff keeps 100% of what they earn.
pricing.page.faq7q: What payment methods do you accept?
pricing.page.faq7a: We process all major credit cards, debit cards, mobile wallets (Apple Pay, Google Pay), and ACH transfers. Processing fees are industry-standard with no markup.
pricing.page.faq8a: No contracts required. You can cancel anytime with 30 days notice. We believe in earning your business every month.
pricing.page.roiSubtitle: Calculate your true monthly cost including all the essentials that competitors charge extra for.
pricing.page.roiCalcDesc: Quick estimate based on your business size and usage

help.seoDesc: Get help with NeonO. Find answers to common questions about pricing, features, setup, and support.
help.title: How Can We Help?
help.subtitle: Search our knowledge base or browse common questions below
help.supportAvailable: Our support team is available 24/7 to assist you
help.gs.q1: How do I get started with NeonO?
help.gs.a1: Sign up for a free 14-day trial at neono.ca/signup. No credit card required. After signing up, you'll complete a quick onboarding to set up your business profile, then you can start adding services, staff, and appointments immediately.
help.gs.a2: Most salons are fully operational within 2-4 hours. Our guided setup walks you through: business details, service menu, staff profiles, and calendar configuration. We also offer free migration assistance if you're switching from another platform.
help.gs.q3: Can I import data from my current system?
help.gs.a3: Yes! We support data imports from Fresha, Vagaro, Square, and most other platforms. Contact our support team after signup and we'll handle the migration for free.
help.pb.a1: You pay $16.99/month per active chair or service station. If you have 4 chairs, that's $67.96/month. After 7 chairs, all additional chairs are FREE—so 8+ chairs is still just $118.93/month total.
help.pb.a2: No. Everything is included: appointments, POS, marketing, SMS, email, website builder, AI analytics, and more. The only additional cost is payment processing (2.9% + 30¢ per transaction), which goes to Stripe, not us.
help.pb.a3: Absolutely. We're month-to-month with no long-term contracts. Cancel anytime from your account settings. No cancellation fees, no questions asked.
help.pb.q4: Do you charge commissions on tips?
help.pb.a4: Never. Your staff keeps 100% of their tips. We don't take a cut like some competitors do.
help.fc.q1: Does NeonO work for barbershops and spas, or just salons?
help.fc.a1: NeonO works for all beauty and wellness businesses: hair salons, barbershops, nail salons, spas, medical aesthetics, and more. The platform adapts to your specific business type.
help.fc.a2: Yes. Your customers can book appointments anytime through your custom booking page or embedded widget on your website. They'll receive automatic confirmations and reminders via SMS and email.
help.fc.q3: Does NeonO have a mobile app?
help.fc.a3: Yes, NeonO works perfectly on mobile browsers and can be installed as a Progressive Web App (PWA) on iOS and Android. Your staff can manage appointments, check out customers, and view schedules from their phones.
help.fc.a4: Yes. Multi-location management is included. You can view all locations from one dashboard or switch between locations. Each location has its own calendar, staff, and settings.
help.ts.q1: What kind of support do you offer?
help.ts.a1: 24/7 support via live chat and email. We also have a comprehensive knowledge base with video tutorials. Most questions are answered within 2 hours, critical issues within 30 minutes.
help.ts.a2: Yes. All plans include free onboarding training. We provide video tutorials, live webinars, and one-on-one setup calls if needed. Your staff will be comfortable using NeonO within a day.
help.ts.q3: What if I need help migrating from another platform?
help.ts.a3: We handle it for free. Our team will migrate your customer data, appointment history, and service menu from your old system. Typical migration takes 2-3 business days.
help.sc.a1: Yes. NeonO is SOC 2 Type II certified and PCI DSS Level 1 compliant. We use bank-level encryption, secure cloud infrastructure, and daily backups. Your data is safer with us than on local computers.
help.sc.a2: Yes. For medical spas and aesthetics clinics handling protected health information, we offer HIPAA-compliant configurations and sign Business Associate Agreements (BAAs).
help.sc.a3: You do. You can export all your data anytime in standard formats (CSV, PDF). If you cancel, you retain full access to download your data for 30 days.

security.seoDesc: Learn about NeonO's enterprise-grade security measures, compliance certifications, and data protection practices.
security.title: Enterprise-grade security you can trust
security.subtitle: Your business data and customer information are protected by industry-leading security measures and compliance certifications.
security.soc2Desc: Annual audits ensure our security controls meet the highest industry standards for availability, security, and confidentiality.
security.encryptionDesc: All data is encrypted in transit using TLS 1.3 and at rest using AES-256 encryption with customer-managed keys.
security.hipaaDesc: Full HIPAA compliance for medical spas and healthcare providers, with signed BAAs and audit trails.
security.rbacDesc: Granular permissions system ensures users only access data necessary for their role.
security.pciDesc: Highest level of PCI compliance for secure payment processing and cardholder data protection.
security.infraDesc: Multi-region cloud infrastructure with automated backups, failover, and 99.9% uptime SLA.
security.complianceSubtitle: We maintain the highest standards of compliance to protect your business and ensure regulatory adherence.
security.encryptionEverywhereDesc: TLS 1.3 for data in transit, AES-256 for data at rest
security.dataResidencyDesc: Choose where your data is stored and processed
security.mfaDesc: Required for all admin accounts and staff access
security.sessionManagementDesc: Automatic logout and session timeout controls
security.auditTrailsDesc: Complete logging of all user actions and data access
security.questionsDesc: Our security team is available to answer any questions about our practices, compliance, or to provide additional documentation for your evaluation.

pricing.page.faq2a: Salon plans start at {minChairs} chairs for {minPrice}/month. Each chair costs {pricePerChair}/month for the first {maxBillableChairs} chairs. After that, chairs {maxBillableChairsPlus1} and beyond are completely FREE—no additional cost as you grow. The maximum you'll ever pay is {maxPrice}/month, regardless of team size.
pricing.page.faq3a: Yes! Once you have {maxBillableChairs} chairs, every additional chair is completely free. Whether you have {maxBillableChairsPlus1} chairs or {maxChairs} chairs, you pay the same price: {maxPrice}/month. This makes NeonO incredibly cost-effective for growing salons and multi-location businesses.

enhancedTestimonials.title: Loved by thousands of beauty professionals
enhancedTestimonials.subtitle: See how NeonO is helping businesses like yours thrive and grow.
enhancedTestimonials.t1.quote: NeonO transformed our salon completely. We've increased bookings by 85% and our no-show rate dropped to just 2%. The automated reminders and seamless booking experience keep our customers coming back.
enhancedTestimonials.t2.quote: The POS system is incredibly intuitive. My stylists love how easy it is to process payments and manage tips. We've seen a 40% increase in tip income since switching.
enhancedTestimonials.t3.quote: Our spa's efficiency has improved dramatically. The staff scheduling and room management features alone have saved us 15 hours per week. ROI was immediate.
enhancedTestimonials.t4.quote: The marketing automation is game-changing. Our client retention increased by 60% with automated campaigns and review requests. It practically runs itself.
